scripts.dev:main: npm run sync:brand && npm --prefix apps/main run dev
scripts.dev:benchmarks: npm run sync:brand && npm --prefix apps/benchmarks run dev
scripts.build:main: npm run sync:brand && npm --prefix apps/main run build
scripts.build:benchmarks: npm run sync:brand && npm --prefix apps/benchmarks run build
scripts.build:all: npm run build:main && npm run build:benchmarks
scripts.preview:main: npm run sync:brand && npm --prefix apps/main run preview
scripts.preview:benchmarks: npm run sync:brand && npm --prefix apps/benchmarks run preview
